hero_slides.alt: Dune's shingled corner storefront on Winter Street, Edgartown — green awnings, a hanging DUNE sign, and mannequins in the corner window.
Dune's main sales floor under a pitched ceiling — a brass chandelier, racks of trousers and shirts, a central knit table, and a mounted fish on the navy wall.
A converted-fireplace shoe wall set in brick — rows of sneakers and loafers, a rail of caps above, and a whale-tail sculpture on the stair landing.
An overhead view of Dune's entrance — a wood surfboard mounted high, track lighting, clothing racks, and a DUNE doormat at the glass door.

collage.alt: A folded stack and rail of fine-gauge knit polos and sweaters on the shop floor.
collage.caption: Fine-gauge knits

collage.alt: Pale linen shirting hung on a rail, light from the harbor side of the shop.
collage.caption: Linen, for the heat off the harbor

collage.alt: Loafers and sneakers lined along the shop's converted-fireplace shoe wall.
collage.caption: Loafers & sneakers

collage.alt: The glass display cabinet — eyewear, watches, and small jewelry kept under glass.
collage.caption: The small things, under glass

instagram.alt: A navy Dune ball cap with a cream script D, worn above tortoiseshell sunglasses in golden light.
instagram.caption: Beach weather's coming.

instagram.alt: A man in a navy-and-cream striped sailor sweater crouched on a beach, sailboats moored offshore.
instagram.caption: The Sailor sweater, into port.

instagram.alt: A bearded man in a plaid flannel shirt beside sunlit coastal rocks and blue water.
instagram.caption: Portuguese Flannel, in shop.

instagram.alt: A navy 'Dune Edg. Gentleman's Supply' hoodie pinned to a clothesline against a pale sky.
instagram.caption: Summer-weight fleece, made in Portugal.
